title: lespedeza × hiratukae
intro: Lespedeza × hiratukae, also known as Japanese clover, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lespedeza × hiratukae include reducing fever, alleviating cough and cold symptoms, and providing relief from headaches and joint pain, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Lespedeza × hiratukae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and its dried flowers and leaves are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
